name: create_word_file
note: Keyboard-first replay: NO screenshots, NO model calls. The model only gets invoked if the post-replay success check fails (self-heal).

steps.why: launch Word reliably (no Spotlight hotkey gamble)
wait for Word to finish launching
new blank document (skips the template gallery)
set the filename (name field is focused by default)
jump to Desktop (standard macOS save-dialog shortcut)
